title: NANG TAWH A HOLIM NUAM BEK HI’NG

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa nang tungah na khat zong hong ngen kei ning,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng,
Lungdamna kong kohzawh loh zah ding,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng.
Lungkhamna, dahna zing ciangin thuakkha mah ning,
Tua haksatna ka thuak ma-in ah,
Lungdam hong ko nuam ing Topa aw,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Haksatnate in thu hong ngen sak pahpah a,
Tu'n bel a holim nuam bek hÆ°á»Ÿng,
Nang tawh a holim nuam bek hi'ng.
